title: Massaman Curry
description: A rich and flavorful Thai curry made with a blend of spices, coconut milk, and your choice of protein. This Massaman curry recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the Massaman curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onions, garlic, potatoes, and peanuts. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 10-15 minutes.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
